title: J3 Create
description: A Custom Create Modpack with custom recipes, trading, addons and Quality of Life features.
body:
![J3 Create Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3a89ae398425f5e1de0b17eb7004fea810448e2_0.webp)


A Project with the Main focus on Create and the goal of a World
that stays forever.
With many Addons to automate Enchanting, Resource Gathering, Trading & more.
QoL Mods and a bunch of Building Blocks and we try to keep it under 100 Mods
for a light to medium Modded Experience.
You can play on the Main Server or Create your own!



<details>
<summary>Main Content Mods</summary>

- Farmers Delight
- Create + Addons like:
- Enchantment Industry
- New Age
- Crafts & Additions
- Dreams & Desires
- & more

</details>




<details>
<summary>Main Visual Mods</summary>

- Distand Horizons
- Amplified Nether
- Oculus (for Shaders)
- & more

</details>



**Edit:**
I "tried" to keep it under 100 mods.
With 1.0.0 there are now 143 mods.
Most mods are just API's and Mods that
make the game look and feel nice.

**Old Worlds:**
There are mods from the previous version that 
made old worlds for the new version not loadable.
There is a workaround.
Edit your level.dat with the NBT Explorer and remove
anything related to dnd (Dreams and Desires).

### Mainserver is currently not avaiable.
**Server will be added again with update 1.1!**

### Serverpack can be found in:
**Versions -> J3 Create 1.x.x -> Files (Bottom Page)**
